scripts.keys:sync: anchor keys sync && ID=$(anchor keys list | grep layerswap_depository | awk '{print $2}') && sed -i "s/layerswap_depository = \".*\"/layerswap_depository = \"$ID\"/g" Anchor.toml
scripts.pretest: test -f target/deploy/spl_memo_v2.so || solana program dump MemoSq4gqABAXKb96qnH8TysNcWxMyWCqXgDLGmfcHr target/deploy/spl_memo_v2.so -u mainnet-beta
